case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JOEL BABBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-03-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BABBS, JOEL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2019
